title: March 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}
'''March 13''' is the 72nd day of the year (73rd in leap years). There are 293 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[William F. Wu]] is born.
*[[1990]] – [[Alec Medlock]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Storybook]]'' published.
*1997 – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back: A Storybook]]'' published.
*1997 – ''[[Return of the Jedi: A Storybook]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars Insider 48|''Star Wars Insider'' 48]] is released to subscribers.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars: Jango Fett (one-shot)|''Star Wars: Jango Fett'']] released.
*2002 – [[Starfighter: Crossbones 3|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 3]] released.
*2002 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 11|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 11]] published.
*[[2009]] – "[[Liberty on Ryloth]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2010]] – "[[Senate Murders]]" airs in the UK on [[Wikipedia:Sky Movies|Sky Movies]].
*[[2012]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]'' published.
*2012 – [[Star Wars Insider 132|''Star Wars Insider'' 132]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Malachi Throne]] dies.
*2013 – [[Star Wars (2013) 3|''Star Wars'' (2013) 3]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures Season Two]]'' released on DVD.
*[[2019]] – [[Han Solo - Imperial Cadet 5|''Han Solo - Imperial Cadet'' 5]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Republic - General Grievous 1|''Age of Republic - General Grievous'' 1]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Unfinished Business (episode)|Unfinished Business]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – "[[Rey and Friends vs. The First Order]],""[[Kylo Ren and Darth Vader - A Legacy of Power]]," and "[[The Force Calls to Rey]]" are uploaded to YouTube
*2020 – The [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars - The Final Season (Episodes 1-4)|soundtrack]] for the first four episodes of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' [[The Clone Wars: Season Seven|season seven]] is released.
*[[2024]] – "[[Infiltration (episode)|Infiltration]]" and "[[Extraction]]" air on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 44|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 44]] published.
*2024 – [[Mace Windu 2|''Mace Windu'' 2]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 4|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 4]] published.
<noinclude>
